options.name: <numberToLimit>
options.description: Limits error and warning messages to a specified number per unique ID. Any occurrences beyond the limit are suppressed. The default limit is 20 per message ID. The default limit is applicable only for ERROR* and WARNING* messages; there is no default limit for verify*, check* and INFO* messages. (int, required) <prefix [ID1, ID2, ...]> # Limits error and warning messages to a specified number per unique ID of specified prefix.
